mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_student SET name=#{name}, gender=#{gender}, phone=#{phone}, email=#{email}, status=#{status}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM tb_student WHERE phone=#{phone} AND status=1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_student
name LIKE CONCAT("%",#{name},"%")
AND phone LIKE CONCAT("%",#{phone},"%")
AND status = #{status}
SELECT name, gender, phone, email, status FROM tb_student WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_student SET name=#{name}, gender=#{gender}, phone=#{phone}, email=#{email}, status=#{status} WHERE id = #{id}
